description: India CPI (Combined / Urban / Rural) — division indices, base 2024=100 (COICOP 2018)
source: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI), Government of India
provenance_note: Auto-refreshed from MoSPI eSankhyiki CPI API on 2026-04-27. Division weights are MoSPI's published 2024-base CPI weights derived from HCES 2023-24 (COICOP 2018 framework).
